footer.tagline: Browser-based and server-assisted tools for editing, converting, compressing, analyzing, transcribing, summarizing, and otherwise processing image, video, and audio files.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Media Manipulator, a CreaTV Ltd. product. All rights reserved.

cookieDialog.title: Cookie preferences
cookieDialog.description: Cookie preferences are managed by Google. Please reload the page if the cookie banner does not appear, or visit our Privacy Policy for details on how Media Manipulator processes data.

contentStudioCta.title: Content Studio
contentStudioCta.body: Edit, layer, and mix video & audio on a multi-track timeline, then export MP4 — a Premiere Pro–style editor, right in your browser.

hero.title: Free Online Media Converter, Editor, Transcriber & Metadata Tool
hero.subtitle: Convert, compress, edit, transcribe, summarize, inspect metadata, and clean up image, video, and audio files directly from your browser.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your file here
upload.orClickSelect: or click to select from your computer
upload.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please select an image, video, or audio file.

history.title: Conversion History
history.subtitle: Reopen or download any image, video, or audio result from this session.

result.convertedSubtitle: Toggle between the original and finalized edited version of {{filename}}.

progress.finalizing: Staging uploaded file on the server...

step1.title: Upload a file
step1.body: Drag any image, video, or audio file into the upload zone on the left, or click Choose File. Files stay on our servers for at most 24 hours and are then deleted.

step2.title: Pick your settings here
step2.body: The right panel will switch to the appropriate converter — image, video, or audio — once a file is selected. Pick a format, tweak filters, or enable an AI operation.

step3.title: Convert
step3.body: Click Convert File. Watch the progress bar — jobs run on our GPU server in real time.

step4.title: Preview and download
step4.body: The result auto-previews when it's ready. Toggle between Original and Final, then click Download.

localAi.title: Includes local AI tools
localAi.body: Face blur, background removal, AI upscale, OCR-based text/PII redaction, voice cleanup, vocal isolation, and karaoke vocal removal all run on our own GPU server. No third-party AI providers see your files.

notSure.title: Not sure where to begin?
notSure.body: Our step-by-step tutorials walk through every setting in the audio, video, and image converters — including the AI tools.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.body: Media Manipulator runs FFmpeg and ImageMagick for standard conversions, and dedicated AI models on our local GPU for the optional AI operations. All processing happens on servers we control — read the full breakdown for details.

notFound.title: This sector of the ship doesn't exist
notFound.body: The coordinates you punched in don't map to anything on the navigation console. Try one of the routes below — or head back to the main bridge and pick a tool that does exist.
